name: Phoenix Golf Lounge
about: Phoenix Golf Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue in Kerrville, Texas, offering a 24/7 accessible facility for golfers of all levels. The venue is powered by TrackMan technology, providing access to over 240 hyper-realistic virtual courses and detailed swing analytics. It features a climate-controlled environment with a state-of-the-art simulator room for an immersive golf experience. The facility operates on a mixed pricing model, offering hourly rentals, standard and elite memberships, and event bookings, while also including a wellness center gym membership with select plans.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan's industry-leading analytics and app for tracking progress
Phoenix Wellness Center Gym Membership included with elite plans

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is not permitted. Water and approved drinks may be purchased on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art TrackMan simulator with radar-based launch monitoring

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not permitted in the facility. Water and approved drinks may be purchased on-site.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the simulator software and the number of people in your group, but it generally takes 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, guests under 16 must be accompanied by a parent or guardian, and the venue offers activities suitable for families.
